subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The concept of law is ancient. Just as God and His creation have always co-existed, so too have humankind and law
subcodes.first_line_orig: علم حقوق قدیم است مادام خدا بوده خلق بوده مادام خلق بوده علم حقوق هم بوده
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @justice and mercy, @reward and punishment
